things.name: Herrenhausen Gardens
things.description: Magnificent baroque royal gardens with Europe's highest fountain and the grotto by Niki de Saint Phalle

things.name: Sprengel Museum
things.description: One of Germany's finest 20th-century art museums with Niki de Saint Phalle and Kurt Schwitters

things.name: New Town Hall
things.description: Imposing early 20th-century city hall with a unique curved elevator to the dome

things.name: Maschsee Lake
things.description: Artificial lake created in the 1930s with sailing, rowing and lakeside restaurants

things.name: Lower Saxony State Museum
things.description: Natural history, art and archaeology from prehistoric times to the present

things.name: Eilenriede Forest
things.description: One of Europe's largest urban forests with paths, cafes and the Ernst August Zoo

things.name: Market Church
things.description: Impressive 14th-century Gothic brick church facing the historic market square

things.name: Kestner Museum
things.description: Applied arts museum in a Wilhelmine building with Egyptian, Greek and Roman collections

things.name: Historisches Museum Hannover
things.description: History of Hanover and the Welfenhaus dynasty that became the British royal family

things.name: Leibniz House
things.description: Reconstructed Renaissance townhouse where philosopher Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz lived
